quotes.quote: Specifically, it uses the classic Upper Confidence Bound (UCB) algorithm to select the most promising record.
quotes.rationale: A UCB acquisition rule selects records, i.e. it controls search and promotion within the loop.

quotes.quote: Across the three tasks, DeepScientist generate over 5,000 unique ideas, yet only about 1,100 are deemed worthy of experimental validation by the system's selection mechanism, and a mere 21 ultimately result in scientific progress.
quotes.rationale: Shows the selection mechanism operationally gates which ideas transition to experimental validation.

quotes.quote: This deeply validated record becomes a new record in the system's knowledge base, thus influencing the decision-making process in all subsequent cycles.
quotes.rationale: Validated records are admitted to the knowledge base and route back into later decisions.

quotes.quote: The architecture of DeepScientist actualizes the Bayesian Optimization loop through a multi-agent system equipped with an open-knowledge system and a continuously accumulating Findings Memory. This memory is composed of both frontier human knowledge (e.g., papers and codes) and the system's own historical findings, and it intelligently guides subsequent explorations.
quotes.rationale: Describes the cumulative memory whose contents guide subsequent exploration.

quotes.quote: A critical step in our pipeline is a secondary verification process: after Claude Code reports completion, DeepScientist independently re-executes the main script via the command line. This measure was implemented to counteract a high rate of false positives-we observed that approximately 50% of initial implementation attempts failed to complete fully due to internal timeouts within the Claude Code agent.
quotes.rationale: An independent re-execution channel targeting executability, motivated by a measured ~50% false-positive rate of the coding agent's self-report.

quotes.quote: Three human experts supervise the process to verify outputs and filter out hallucinations.
quotes.rationale: Human experts verify outputs and filter hallucinations in-loop.

quotes.quote: Throughout this project, all experimental results were manually inspected by human supervisors to guarantee their authenticity.
quotes.rationale: Confirms manual human inspection of all experimental results.

quotes.quote: First, to benchmark against existing work, we employ DeepReviewer (Zhu et al., 2025a), an AI agent that simulates the human peer-review process with an external search capability, comparing DeepScientist's output against 28 publicly available papers from other AI Scientist systems.
quotes.rationale: An LLM reviewer agent scores final papers against a comparison corpus; used for benchmarking, not routed back into search.

quotes.quote: Second, for a more rigorous assessment, we convene a dedicated program committee consisting of three active LLM researchers: two volunteers who have served as ICLR reviewers and one senior volunteer who has been invited to be an ICLR Area Chair.
quotes.rationale: A convened committee of volunteer researchers provides terminal human assessment of final papers.

quotes.quote: To make the AI a more capable partner, future work should focus on key enhancements: developing simulated discovery environments to accelerate learning via reinforcement, creating frameworks for integrating feedback from the scientific community, and ultimately, bridging the gap to the physical sciences through robotics.
quotes.rationale: Robotic/physical validation and community-feedback integration are stated as future work, not exercised.

policy_type: Bayesian Optimization loop over a multi-agent system
Upper Confidence Bound (UCB) acquisition for record selection
staged funnel from idea generation to experimental validation with human supervision
memory_structure: cumulative Findings Memory combining frontier human knowledge (papers, codes) with the system's own historical findings
knowledge base of deeply validated records influencing all subsequent cycles

diagnostics.statement: The coding agent's self-reported completion was unreliable: roughly 50% of initial implementation attempts failed to complete due to internal agent timeouts, producing a high false-positive rate that required a secondary re-execution check.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: This measure was implemented to counteract a high rate of false positives-we observed that approximately 50% of initial implementation attempts failed to complete fully due to internal timeouts within the Claude Code agent.

diagnostics.consequence: Without the independent re-execution gate, roughly half of claimed implementations would enter downstream scoring and memory as spurious successes, corrupting the UCB search signal.

diagnostics.statement: The high-throughput selection mechanism that filters ~5,000 ideas to ~1,100 validation candidates and controls search via UCB has no reported reliability study for its selection or valuation judgments.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Specifically, it uses the classic Upper Confidence Bound (UCB) algorithm to select the most promising record.

Across the three tasks, DeepScientist generate over 5,000 unique ideas, yet only about 1,100 are deemed worthy of experimental validation by the system's selection mechanism, and a mere 21 ultimately result in scientific progress.

diagnostics.consequence: The discrimination and calibration of the scores feeding UCB are unknown, so the reported ~2% progress yield cannot be attributed to selection quality rather than chance or generator volume.

diagnostics.statement: Terminal quality assessment relies on a surrogate LLM reviewer and a small committee of three volunteer researchers convened by the authors; neither is reported as organizationally independent, and neither routes back into the loop.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Second, for a more rigorous assessment, we convene a dedicated program committee consisting of three active LLM researchers: two volunteers who have served as ICLR reviewers and one senior volunteer who has been invited to be an ICLR Area Chair.

diagnostics.consequence: Claims of paper-level quality rest on non-independent terminal judgments with no reported agreement or bias analysis, and offer no corrective signal to the discovery process.

diagnostics.statement: Human supervisors verify outputs, filter hallucinations, and manually inspect all experimental results, but their decision authority, escalation path, and routing into memory or policy are not specified.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Three human experts supervise the process to verify outputs and filter out hallucinations.
Throughout this project, all experimental results were manually inspected by human supervisors to guarantee their authenticity.

diagnostics.consequence: The degree of autonomy of the reported loop is indeterminate, so results cannot be read as evidence of unsupervised discovery.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Specifically, it uses the classic Upper Confidence Bound (UCB) algorithm to select the most promising record.

Across the three tasks, DeepScientist generate over 5,000 unique ideas, yet only about 1,100 are deemed worthy of experimental validation by the system's selection mechanism, and a mere 21 ultimately result in scientific progress.

success_check.observable: Discrimination and calibration of the selection scores against realized experimental outcomes for the ~1,100 promoted candidates
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Selected-idea success rate reliably exceeds a random-selection baseline drawn from the same 5,000-idea pool
success_check.evidence_needed: Reported score-versus-outcome analysis with a matched random or ablated-selection control arm

exact_quotes.exact_quote: First, to benchmark against existing work, we employ DeepReviewer (Zhu et al., 2025a), an AI agent that simulates the human peer-review process with an external search capability, comparing DeepScientist's output against 28 publicly available papers from other AI Scientist systems.

success_check.observable: Quality judgments of the generated papers by evaluators outside the author group and blinded to system provenance
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Independent blinded ratings agree with the surrogate reviewer and the convened committee within a pre-stated margin
success_check.evidence_needed: Blinded external review protocol with reported inter-rater agreement against both existing terminal channels

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Three human experts supervise the process to verify outputs and filter out hallucinations.
A critical step in our pipeline is a secondary verification process: after Claude Code reports completion, DeepScientist independently re-executes the main script via the command line.

success_check.observable: Explicit specification of which decisions the automated re-execution check makes versus which require human supervisor approval
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Every stage transition and memory admission is attributed to a named automated or human authority with no unattributed steps
success_check.evidence_needed: A per-stage authority table plus logs showing counts of human interventions and overrides during the reported runs
